steps.title: Find the purpose the student wants to emphasize
steps.content: The notes explain that each day was named “as a way of honoring an aspect of rural life.” This is the core fact the student needs to highlight.

steps.title: Select the choice that emphasizes this purpose with evidence
steps.content: Choice A states the purpose (days honored “an aspect of rural life”) and supports it with a specific example (the goose, an animal). Choices B, C, and D describe structural mechanics (B) or the distinctiveness of names (C, D), none of which conveys how the calendar honored rural life. That matches choice A — A is correct.
